/ Services

Everything
we make.

Nine in-house disciplines. Combine them as you need — most projects use two or three.

/01
Cut. Bend. Polish. Assemble.

Acrylic Fabrication

Custom acrylic display stands, retail fixtures, sneeze guards, partitions and bespoke fabrications — built to spec from cast and extruded acrylic sheets.

  • Edge polishing & flame finishing
  • Solvent & UV bonding
  • Thermoforming & bending
  • Up to 25mm sheet thickness
/02
Precision cuts on acrylic, MDF, ply.

Laser Cutting

CO₂ laser cutting and engraving for clean edges and intricate detail. Production runs and one-offs welcomed.

  • ±0.1mm tolerance
  • Bed size up to 1300×900mm
  • Vector engraving & raster
  • Fast turnaround on small batches
/03
Routed letters, panels, profiles.

CNC Cutting

CNC routing for ACP, MDF, HDF, PVC and aluminium composite — ideal for 3D channel letters and signage substrates.

  • 3-axis routing
  • V-groove & pocketing
  • Channel-letter fabrication
  • Panel sizing & finishing
/04
Vivid direct-to-substrate prints.

UV Printing

Photo-quality UV flatbed printing onto acrylic, wood, metal, glass and more. Scratch-resistant, weatherproof, full CMYK + white.

  • White-ink layers
  • Up to 2440×1220mm bed
  • Direct-to-object
  • 300+ DPI photo quality
/05
Backlit, 3D, neon, façade.

Signage

End-to-end signage — design, fabrication, electrical, installation. From shopfront 3D letters to backlit acrylic and façade boards.

  • LED backlit & edge-lit
  • Stainless / acrylic 3D letters
  • Façade & shopfront boards
  • Site survey + installation
/06
Awards that earn a desk spot.

Trophies

Acrylic and crystal trophies for sports, corporate and academic events. Personalised engraving and UV-printed graphics.

  • Bespoke shapes
  • UV-printed logos
  • Bulk event orders
  • Bases & packaging
/07
Acrylic & wood, framed properly.

Photo Frames

Acrylic block frames, magnetic frames, and traditional wood frames — single units or wedding & event volumes.

  • Acrylic blocks
  • Magnetic & standoff
  • Custom sizes
  • Volume pricing
/08
Branded, boxed, thoughtful.

Custom Gifts

Corporate gifting — desk accessories, name plates, branded keepsakes — laser-cut, UV-printed and packaged.

  • Logo-matched colourways
  • Mixed-material builds
  • Bulk + individual
  • Gift packaging available
/09
Recognition done right.

Corporate Awards

End-of-year, employee recognition and milestone awards. Designed with you, manufactured in-house.

  • Design + production
  • Engraving & UV print
  • Branded packaging
  • Repeat-order memory

Ready to start?

Request a quote →
SRENTERPRISES

Acrylic fabrication, CNC cutting, UV printing, signage, trophies, podiums, and custom display solutions in Bangalore.
